session.user:
Run the fast CI checks for this Python project. Execute: 1. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff check src/ tests/` (linting) 2. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/` (formatting) 3. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ty check src/` (type checking)
Report all errors, warnings, and failures. Do NOT fix anything - just report results.
session.assistant: I'll execute the three CI checks for you. Since these are independent commands, I'll run them in parallel.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ tests/
Run ruff linting check on src/ and tests/

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/
Run ruff format check on src/ and tests/

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type checking on src/

session.assistant:
## CI Check Results
### 1. Ruff Linting (`ruff check`) - FAILED
**3 errors found** (2 fixable with `--fix`)
- **src/erk/cli/commands/objective/list_cmd.py:23** - F401: `user_output` imported but unused - **tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py:3** - I001: Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted - **tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py:490** - F841: Local variable `fake_gh` assigned but never used
### 2. Ruff Format Check (`ruff format --check`) - FAILED
**1 file would be reformatted:**
- `tests/commands/objective/test_remote_paths.py`
Summary: 1213 files already formatted, 1 needs formatting.
### 3. Type Checking (`ty check`) - FAILED
**6 type errors found** in `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py`
All errors relate to unresolved attributes on `repo.github` which is `GitHubRepoId | None`:
- Line 142: `Attribute owner is not defined on None in union GitHubRepoId | None` - Line 143: `Attribute repo is not defined on None in union GitHubRepoId | None` - Line 224: `Attribute owner is not defined on None in union GitHubRepoId | None` - Line 225: `Attribute repo is not defined on None in union GitHubRepoId | None` - Line 753: `Attribute owner is not defined on None in union GitHubRepoId | None` - Line 754: `Attribute repo is not defined on None in union GitHubRepoId | None`
**Summary:** All three CI checks failed. There are 3 linting issues (1 unused import, 1 import sorting, 1 unused variable), 1 formatting issue, and 6 type checking errors related to null-safety checks.
